popularStory.headline: Biography of Nicholas Vaux
popularStory.description: Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden (c. 1460 – 14 May 1523) was a soldier and courtier in England and an early member of the House of Commons . The son of Lancastrian loyalists, Sir William …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden於大約1460年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親Sir William Vaux26歲，母親Catherine Penyson21歲。他於大約1483年與Elizabeth FitzHugh結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1523年5月14日在英國米德萊可可拉肯維爾 聖 約翰享年64歲，埋葬在英國倫敦布拉可福利亞斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden于大约1460年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲Sir William Vaux26岁，母亲Catherine Penyson21岁。他于大约1483年与Elizabeth FitzHugh结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1523年5月14日在英国米德萊可可拉肯維爾 聖 約翰享年64岁，埋葬在英国倫敦布拉可福利亞斯。

nameMeanings.name: Vaux,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of various places in northern France called Vaux, from the Old French plural of val ‘valley’. Compare English Vause and French Devaux .

History: Richard Vaux (1749–90) emigrated from Sussex, England, to Philadelphia, PA, in early youth. Calvert Vaux, landscape architect, emigrated from London, England, to America in 1850 and designed several major US parks, including Central Park in New York City (with Frederick Olmstead). — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its variant Veaux and altered form Devoe ) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Vause
meanings: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Vaux (see Vaux ), a common French placename, singular and plural of val ‘valley’, the plural form being Latinized in surnames as de Vallibus. Norman lords with this surname are recorded in 12th- and early 13th-century records in Cumberland (Irthington), Devon (Farwood, in Colyton), East Yorkshire (Warter), Essex (Belchamp), and Leicestershire (Belvoir). Compare Vale .

nickname perhaps from Middle English fals, faus, vaus (Old French fals, faus, Old English fals) ‘deceitful, disloyal, dishonest, mendacious’, but it is more likely the name arises from 1, with the common Anglo-Norman French substitution of le for de in their surname.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden was born about 1460, in Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sir William Vaux, was 26 and his mother, Catherine Penyson, was 21. He married Elizabeth FitzHugh about 1483. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 14 May 1523, in Clerkenwell St John, Middlesex, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Blackfriars, London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden est né environ 1460, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Vaux, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Catherine Penyson, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth FitzHugh environ 1483. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 14 mai 1523, à Clerkenwell St John, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Blackfriars, Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden um 1460 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Vaux 26 und seine Mutter Catherine Penyson 21. Er hat um 1483 Elizabeth FitzHugh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Mai 1523 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Clerkenwell St John, Middlesex, England und wurde in Blackfriars, London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden è nato il circa 1460 nel Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Vaux, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Penyson, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth FitzHugh circa 1483. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 14 maggio 1523, nel Clerkenwell St John, Middlesex, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Blackfriars, London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowdenが約1460年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William Vauxは26歳，母Catherine Penysonは21歳であった。約1483年にElizabeth FitzHughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1523年5月14日にイギリスミッドレセックスクラーケンウエル スト ジョンで64歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンブラクフリアルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden(이)가 대략 1460년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Vaux(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Penyson(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1483년 Elizabeth FitzHugh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1523년 5월 14일 영국 미들레세스 클레르켄웰 스트 존에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던 블랙프리아르스에 묻혔다.

mn.Harrowden, Northampton, England: Harrowden, North Hamtunscire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden nasceu aproximadamente 1460, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Vaux, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Penyson, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth FitzHugh aproximadamente 1483. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de maio de 1523, em Clerkenwell St John, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden родился около 1460 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Vaux было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Penyson, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth FitzHugh около 1483 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 14 мая 1523 г. в местности клиркенвелл ст джон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности блэккфрярс, Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden nació aproximadamente 1460, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Vaux, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Catherine Penyson, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elizabeth FitzHugh aproximadamente 1483. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 14 de mayo de 1523, en Clerkenwell St John, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra.
